name: streamName
description: Provided to help understand which channel or tributary the project was performed on. This name is unofficial, and not used for any GNIS lookup or processing.

name: lengthKm
description: The treatment length represents the length of riverscape that was treated as part of the project. This is approximate, and should represent the valley distance from the most upstream structure to the most downstream.

name: budget.usDollarVal
description: Approximate budget of the PBR project in US dollars

name: AREA_PLANTED_HECTARES
description: Total area planted as part of the restoration project.

name: AREA_FLOODPLAIN_TREATMENT_HECTARES
description: Total floodplain area treated as part of the restoration project.

name: LEVEES_BANK_PROTECTIONS_REMOVED_KM
description: Total length of levees or bank protections removed as part of the restoration project.

name: STRUCTURES_BUILT
description: Number of structures built as part of the restoration project.

name: STRUCTURES_REMOVED
description: Number of structures removed as part of the restoration project.

name: WOOD_ADDED
description: Amount of wood added as part of the restoration project.

name: TREES_FELLED
description: Number of trees felled as part of the restoration project.

name: IMPOUNDMENTS_REMOVED
description: Number of impoundments removed as part of the restoration project.

name: BEAVERS_TRANSLOCATED_INTRODUCED
description: Number of beavers translocated or introduced as part of the restoration project.

name: BEAVER_TRAPPING_CLOSURE
description: Length of stream where beaver trapping was closed as part of the restoration project.

name: STRUCTURES_MAINTAINED
description: Number of structures maintained as part of the restoration project.

name: EXCLOSURE_FENCING
description: Total length of exclosure fencing installed as part of the restoration project.
